use_cases: Display featured content with animated geometric visuals in dark-themed UIs
Showcase product highlights with elegant hover animations and dark mode support
Create visually striking feature cards with customizable geometric elements
Build portfolio or project cards with animated gradient accents
Design landing page sections with interactive geometric card components
ai_summary: A composite card component featuring animated geometric visuals with dark mode support. The component includes sub-components for card body, title, description, and visual area, designed for showcasing content with elegant hover interactions. Built with Tailwind CSS using a minimalist dark aesthetic with border and shadow styling.
